recommendations.title: Configure blacklist providers
recommendations.explanation: No blacklist providers are currently enabled for reputation checks.

recommendations.title: Add Aggregate Reporting
recommendations.explanation: Configure a valid rua destination to receive DMARC aggregate reports.

recommendations.title: Add SPF Record
recommendations.explanation: Publish an SPF TXT record so receivers can validate which servers may send mail for your domain. Identify your legitimate sending services (mail provider, CRM, marketing platform) before publishing.

recommendations.title: Verify DKIM Signing With a Sample Message
recommendations.explanation: Published DNS keys confirm configuration only. Verify live signing with a sample signed message.

recommendations.title: Add MTA-STS Policy
recommendations.explanation: Publish an MTA-STS DNS indicator and HTTPS policy to enforce secure mail delivery.

recommendations.title: Add BIMI Record
recommendations.explanation: Publish a BIMI TXT record to declare brand indicator configuration.
